# aspect

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/internal/aspect"
```

Package aspect provides the core aspect calculation engine and geometric pattern detection. It is internal to the project and used by the chart and transit packages.

FindAspects detects aspects within a single set of bodies or between two sets. FindCrossAspects computes inter\-chart aspects for synastry overlays. FindPatterns identifies geometric configurations such as T\-squares, grand trines, and yods from a set of aspects.

```go
func SignedAngleDiff(lon1, lon2 float64) float64
```

<a name="AspectPattern"></a>
## type [AspectPattern](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/internal/aspect/patterns.go#L24-L30>)

AspectPattern represents a detected aspect pattern

```go
type AspectPattern struct {
    Type    PatternType `json:"type"`
    Bodies  []string    `json:"bodies"`
    Element string      `json:"element,omitempty"` // for Grand Trine
    Quality string      `json:"quality,omitempty"` // for T-Square/Grand Cross (cardinal/fixed/mutable)
    Apex    string      `json:"apex,omitempty"`    // for T-Square or Yod
}
```

<a name="FindPatterns"></a>
### func [FindPatterns](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/internal/aspect/patterns.go#L33>)

```go
func FindPatterns(aspects []models.AspectInfo, bodies []Body, orbs models.OrbConfig) []AspectPattern
```

FindPatterns detects aspect patterns from a list of aspects and bodies

<a name="Body"></a>
## type [Body](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/internal/aspect/aspect.go#L29-L33>)

Body represents a celestial body or point for aspect calculation

```go
type Body struct {
    ID        string
    Longitude float64
    Speed     float64 // degrees/day, used for applying/separating
}
```

<a name="PatternType"></a>
## type [PatternType](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/internal/aspect/patterns.go#L11>)

PatternType identifies an aspect pattern

```go
type PatternType string
```

<a name="PatternGrandTrine"></a>

```go
const (
    PatternGrandTrine PatternType = "GRAND_TRINE"
    PatternTSquare    PatternType = "T_SQUARE"
    PatternGrandCross PatternType = "GRAND_CROSS"
    PatternYod        PatternType = "YOD"
    PatternKite       PatternType = "KITE"
    PatternMysticRect PatternType = "MYSTIC_RECTANGLE"
    PatternStelllium  PatternType = "STELLIUM"
)
```
